content.fact_text: Implementation of the CheckoutEventProducer class for atomic and idempotent order event publication.

provenance_data.behaviour: The module provides a structured, type-safe, and secure mechanism for publishing order lifecycle events to Kafka, including PII redaction and correlation ID tracking. It uses the provided KafkaMessagingClient and integrates with Pino for structured logging.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a robust interface for domain services to emit state changes to the event-driven architecture, ensuring data consistency and auditability.
